/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libdrone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so -o libdrone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drone_msgs/msg/aruco_detection__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drone_msgs/msg/aruco_detection_array__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drone_msgs/msg/marker_pose__type_support.cpp.o CMakeFiles/drone_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_c/drone_msgs/msg/marker_pose_array__type_support.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/drone/drone_ws/build/drone_msgs:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libdrone_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic -Wl,-rpath-link,/opt/ros/humble/lib
